summary: The user is planning to start a small herb garden in pots on their patio and is seeking advice on potting soil and gardening apps. They also express interest in propagating hydrangea cuttings and making compost tea, while planning to turn their compost pile and add food scraps this weekend.
facts: The user is starting a small herb garden in pots on their patio. The user has been experimenting with different gardening apps to track their progress. The user plans to start a new section for their herb garden in their gardening app. The user received hydrangea cuttings from their neighbor's garden. The user has been planning their garden for three weeks and researching companion planting and crop rotation. The user has been saving food scraps and coffee grounds in a bucket in the kitchen for composting. The user plans to turn their compost pile and add food scraps and coffee grounds this weekend.
